user.title: Connect to Gemini API
user.description: Enter your Gemini API key to enable text-to-speech with Matilda's voice. Get your API key at [{api_key_url}]({api_key_url}).

reauth_confirm.title: Update API Key
reauth_confirm.description: Enter a new Gemini API key. Get your API key at [{api_key_url}]({api_key_url}).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Gemini API. Check your API key.

init.title: Configure Gemini TTS Matilda
init.description: Leave API Key empty to keep the current one, or enter a new one.

data.api_key: API Key (leave empty to keep current)
